Dear Sir / Madam, 
 
Sub: Transcript of Earnings Call pertaining to the Unaudited Financial Results 
of the Company for Q2 FY 23. 
 
In continuation to our intimation dated 4th November, 2022, please find below 
web link of transcript of the Earnings Call held on 4th November, 2022 on 
Unaudited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) of the Company for 
the quarter and half year ended 30th September, 2022.  
 
Weblink to access above transcript is as under: 
 
https://www.adanienterprises.com/-

Call-Transcripts/Q2-23-Conference-Call-Trranscript.pdf
